success_output.title: Landing page as final production artifact
success_output.note: Input and runtime evidence are converted to a landing page with visible trust signals.

captions.text: agentic-sdlc turns software delivery into deterministic, auditable execution.
First, we show structure: CLI, workflow engine, and skill registry layers.
Second, we show CLI commands teams run daily across setup, checks, and tracing.
Third, we show real use cases including feature delivery, security scan gating, and project intelligence.
Finally, the landing page ships as the production output from real trace evidence.
